Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests

Class AdditiveSimplifierTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.rewriterTests.AdditiveSimplifierTests
public class AdditiveSimplifierTests extends Object
Unit tests for the additive formula simplifier.
